response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web, backend, and D-language experience, but the role explicitly requires a Senior C++ developer with deep STL, multi-threading, message-broker, IoT, and IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no evidence of industrial automation, MQTT, OPC UA, or SDL experience. The skill mismatch is too large for a mid-senior C++ specialist position.
strengths: 12+ years of professional software development with senior/staff-level scope
Strong testing, TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship discipline
Multi-language polyglot with experience in performance-sensitive systems (DLang, low-latency microservices)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only ~6 months at NI back in 2014–2015
No demonstrated industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 / SDL background
Primary stack is web/cloud (TypeScript, Node.js), not on-premises high-performance C++ systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / IoT protocol experience
